'''鈭歭-ch-w-w''' ('''kalachwewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:duncify|duncify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:duncify|duncify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-ch-w-w
|-
! Lemma
| kalachwewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilachwewoko|thilachwewoko]] || [[word:jilachwewoko|jilachwewoko]] || [[word:shilachwewoko|shilachwewoko]] || [[word:kilachwewoko|kilachwewoko]]
|-
